summary: Mobile responsiveness testing at 390px (iPhone), 360px (Android), and 768px (tablet) viewports. All 12 test cases passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All mobile responsive fixes verified. 390px: no horizontal overflow, hero text readable, CTA buttons >= 44px, REACH pillar grid in 2-column, all 5 pillar names visible, Vince photo 220px max-width with face visible, hamburger menu opens with all 8 nav links, Knowledge Center single-column, Four Pillars single-column, Ground 0 briefing page no overflow. 360px: no overflow. 768px: REACH grid shows 3 columns, no overflow.
